groups.name: mill.data.sql
groups.description: SQL settings for data query parsing and execution. Configures sql dialect and sql conventions for parser. Conventions will be applied for client sql

groups.name: mill.data.backend
groups.description: Data backend selection and backend settings.

groups.name: mill.data.backend.metadata
groups.description: Backend-contributed metadata sources (flow inferred facets, logical layout). Use enabled as a kill-switch; redact controls secret hygiene in flow storage payloads.

properties.name: mill.data.backend.metadata.enabled
properties.description: When false, no backend MetadataSource beans (including FlowDescriptorMetadataSource) are registered.

properties.name: mill.data.backend.metadata.redact
properties.description: Hygiene for storage objects embedded in flow-schema inferred facets (none | basic | safe).

values.description: Backend type used by mill application. Only one backend can be active at a time.
Backend type used by mill application. Only one backend can be active at a time.
Pass storage params through unchanged (may expose credentials).
Strip delegated secrets and SAS material from endpoint URLs.
Allow-list only structural fields per storage type (bucket, container, prefix, etc.).
